name: Marc Johnson
description: American jazz bass player, composer and band leader
abstract: Marc Alan Johnson (born October 21, 1953, in Omaha, Nebraska) is an American jazz bass player, composer and band leader. Johnson was born in Nebraska and grew up in Texas.

about_quotes.evidence: I was about to do a tour with an all-star kind of group, with Pat Metheny and Peter Erskine and Marc Johnson and Mitch Forman on keyboards
